task_completion.description: The agent opened and read the deployment specification document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor, file viewer, or terminal displaying the contents of /home/ga/Desktop/deployment_spec.txt.

task_completion.description: The agent used the Edge GUI to create the required bookmark folders and bookmarks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Edge browser's Favorites manager or Favorites bar showing the creation of folders 'Market Data', 'Regulatory', and 'Internal Tools', and adding the specified URLs to them.

task_completion.description: The agent used the Edge GUI to configure the startup pages and home button URL.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Edge Settings (Start, home, and new tabs) showing startup pages being set to Yahoo Finance and GitHub, and the Home button URL being set to https://intranet.meridianfs.com.

task_completion.description: The agent used the Edge GUI to configure privacy, password, and autofill settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Edge Settings showing Tracking prevention being set to Strict, Do Not Track being enabled, and passwords/address autofill being disabled.

task_completion.description: The agent used the Edge GUI to configure the default search engine and download directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Edge Settings showing the default search engine being set to DuckDuckGo and the download location being changed to /home/ga/Documents/Downloads.

task_completion.description: The agent exported the favorites to the specified HTML file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Edge Favorites manager's export dialog being used to save a file named browser_config_export.html to the /home/ga/Documents/ directory.

task_completion.description: The agent created a deployment verification log documenting the changes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal open showing the creation of /home/ga/Desktop/deployment_log.txt with a list of the configuration changes made and their final values.

integrity.description: The agent configured the browser using the Edge GUI as explicitly requested, not by directly editing configuration files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Edge Settings and Favorites GUI. There should be no terminal commands editing ~/.config/microsoft-edge/Default/Preferences or similar JSON files.

integrity.description: The agent used the browser's export feature to generate the favorites HTML file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The export must be performed via Edge's 'Export favorites' menu option, not by manually writing an HTML file or copying a pre-made file from elsewhere.

integrity.description: The agent performed the tasks manually rather than running a pre-written script to complete the deployment.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should be seen manually navigating the GUI and typing out the log file, rather than executing a bash or python script that automates the entire process.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must configure Edge via GUI based on /home/ga/Desktop/deployment_spec.txt. Bookmarks required: 'Market Data' folder (Markets: https://finance.yahoo.com, Terminal: https://www.bloomberg.com, Wire: https://www.reuters.com); 'Regulatory' folder (SEC EDGAR: https://www.sec.gov, FINRA: https://www.finra.org); 'Internal Tools' folder (Code Repos: https://github.com, Wiki: https://confluence.atlassian.net). Startup pages: https://finance.yahoo.com and https://github.com. Home button URL: https://intranet.meridianfs.com. Privacy: Tracking prevention Strict, password saving disabled, address autofill disabled, Do Not Track enabled. Search engine: DuckDuckGo. Download directory: /home/ga/Documents/Downloads. Exports: Favorites must be exported to /home/ga/Documents/browser_config_export.html. Log: A text file at /home/ga/Desktop/deployment_log.txt must document each change.
